violations.description: COOLING OF POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (5 pts): The methods used for cooling were not adequate.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cutting board not properly maintained.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the ice
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Employee noted eating in an area where sanitized dishes are being stored.
COOLING OF POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (5 pts): The methods used for cooling were not adequate. Beans were noted being cooled inappropriately.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen noted blocked with tortilla bins. Hand washing lavatory in bar noted blocked with items in the sink.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered in walk-in cooler and in reach in freezer.
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods noted not being thawed using approved methods. Beef was noted being thawed using not approved methods.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the sugar. Inappropriate utensil noted being used. Utensil needs to have handle.
